history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark-themed game interface screen shows a “LEVEL UP!” banner above a profile panel with level, experience, and statistics for “Kayz Assisten.”  

Main Subject:
The central focus is a rectangular UI panel with the heading “Kayz Assisten,” a small badge marked “#1,” and multiple stat boxes showing “LEVEL 3,” “EXPERIENCE 2 / 200,” and other counters including messages and XP needed.

Setting:
The image appears to be a digital interface on a dark, purple and navy background with soft gradients and a centered layout; no real-world environment is visible.

Visual Details:
At the top center, gold text reads “LEVEL UP!” with small decorative symbols on either side. Beneath it, a large rounded rectangle panel in dark purple contains the profile name “Kayz Assisten” in large white letters and a small gold pill badge reading “#1.” To the left inside the panel, there is a circular avatar image with a colorful illustration and red accents. In the middle, there are two pill-shaped stat boxes: one purple box showing “LEVEL” with a large white “3,” and one teal/green box showing “EXPERIENCE” with “2 / 200” in white. Below these is a long, thin horizontal progress bar track with a small filled portion on the left, and a “1%” indicator at the right end. Near the lower middle area are three smaller dark stat boxes labeled “MESSAGES” with “33,” “XP NEEDED” with “198,” and “NEXT LVL” with “4.” At the bottom center of the panel, faint text reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” The camera/view is a straight-on, centered composition typical of a UI screenshot.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Kayz Assisten
#1
LEVEL
3
EXPERIENCE
2 / 200
MESSAGES
33
XP NEEDED
198
NEXT LVL
4
1%
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image is a game-style “level up” interface showing a user profile named “Kayz Assisten” with level and experience progress. It also displays additional stats for messages, remaining XP, and the next level number.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
